title: Eric Zeisl oral history transcript : his life and music

description: Transcript of a twelve-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program and the UCLA School of Law
Zeisl recalls her and her husband's life in Vienna; his musical education; details of his compositions and teaching; their émigre life; and settling in California
